NFO Rules

paused: conflict gating The "paused: conflict gating" chip means NFO-category rule fixes are blocked because a connected media server has its own NFO saver on, two connections share a library path, or Stillwater could not confirm a peer's state. The pause prevents write-back loops and round-trips. To resume, disable the server's NFO saver or use the "Let Stillwater manage" toggle on the connection. Read more → NFO rules validate and fix artist information files. Each rule can be disabled, set to manual (notify only), or auto-fix (automatically correct violations during scans). Read more →
NFO present Severity shows how strongly the rule flags a violation: info is informational, warning flags issues worth reviewing, error flags the most serious problems. Severity is set per rule and cannot be changed in the UI; fixers and the conflict gate run identically across all three levels. Read more →

Artist NFO file exists

Automation mode for NFO present Sets whether violations are fixed automatically during scans or queued for manual review on the Reports page. Auto applies corrections without confirmation; Manual records them so you can review and apply individually. Read more →

Images Rules

paused: conflict gating The "paused: conflict gating" chip means image-category rule fixes are blocked because a connected media server has its own image saver on, two connections share a library path, or Stillwater could not confirm a peer's state. The pause prevents write-back loops and round-trips. To resume, disable the server's image saver or use the "Let Stillwater manage" toggle on the connection. Read more → Image rules check for missing, oversized, or incorrectly formatted artist images (posters, banners, logos). Auto-fix mode can fetch and resize images automatically. Read more →

Thumbnail

Thumb present Requires local library The "Requires local library" chip marks a rule that must read or write files on disk. These rules are unavailable when no library has a configured filesystem path. Add at least one library with a real directory path to enable them. Read more →

Thumb artwork exists

Automation mode for Thumb present Sets whether violations are fixed automatically during scans or queued for manual review on the Reports page. Auto applies corrections without confirmation; Manual records them so you can review and apply individually. Read more →

General

Image quality

Artwork meets minimum dimensions

Automation mode for Image quality Sets whether violations are fixed automatically during scans or queued for manual review on the Reports page. Auto applies corrections without confirmation; Manual records them so you can review and apply individually. Read more →

Metadata Rules

Metadata rules verify artist data quality (genres, biographies, sort names, etc.). Auto-fix mode fetches corrections from configured providers. Read more →
Genres present

Artist has at least one genre

Automation mode for Genres present Sets whether violations are fixed automatically during scans or queued for manual review on the Reports page. Auto applies corrections without confirmation; Manual records them so you can review and apply individually. Read more →
